title: vanhouttea gardneri
intro: Vanhouttea gardneri, also known as the Brazilian yerba-mate, is a plant species native to Brazil that belongs to the holly family (Aquifoliaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vanhouttea gardneri include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mental clarity, and aiding in weight loss. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water or as a supplement in capsule or powder form, and has also been used to make a traditional South American infused drink known as mate.
